title: 4 IT Services Stocks to Buy From a Prospering Industry
text: The Zacks Computers - IT Services Industry participants, ServiceNow (NOW), CoStar (CSGP), Amdocs (DOX), and Nutanix (NTNX), are benefiting from ongoing digitization, strong demand for hybrid working solutions and improving IT spending.

title: Best Momentum Stocks to Buy for June 13th
text: EXP, GEF and CSGP made it to the Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) momentum stocks list on June 13, 2023.

title: CoStar Group Named to 20th Anniversary Edition of Forbes Global 2000
text: WASHINGTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--CoStar Group (NASDAQ: CSGP), a leading provider of online real estate marketplaces, information and analytics in the property markets, today was named to Forbes Global 2000 20th Anniversary list, recognizing the company's global influence and sustained growth. The list, published annually since 2003, ranks the world's largest public companies based on sales, profits, assets and market value.
